# Reproducible Reporting

A multiverse is trustworthy only if others can rerun it. Pair `forkflow` with
`targets` to rerun only the specifications that changed, `renv` to pin package
versions, Quarto to weave code and prose, and a fixed seed for exact imputation
and resampling. `report_multiverse()` writes shareable figures and a summary
table.

*(Full chapter in preparation.)*
